chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1906 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 13.12.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. On last date of hearing respondents were restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner as well as police officials were directed to discharge their functions in accordance with law. Today, learned A.A.G states that police officials will provide protection to the petitioner if his complaint so warrants, but in accordance with law. In view of the above observation and with the direction that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioner, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE
